---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for NexusClaw
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Motivation

Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

## 📝 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## 📊 Use Cases

Describe specific use cases where this feature would be beneficial.

**Example 1:**
- User wants to...
- Feature would allow...

**Example 2:**
- User wants to...
- Feature would allow...

## 🎨 UI/UX Considerations

If this feature involves UI changes, describe or sketch the interface.

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

Any technical details or implementation ideas?

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the feature and its benefits
- [ ] I have considered how this fits with NexusClaw's goals
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to implementing this feature
